hero.desc: Skip retail broker markups. Route your copies and manual entries directly to global Tier-1 liquidity centers in Equinix NY4 with spreads from exactly 0.0 pips.

latency.title: NY4 Equinix Server Execution Latency
latency.carbonSub: Fiber-optic bridge connecting to Equinix NY4 Liquidity pools.
latency.legacySub: Prone to server delays, requotes, and market maker arbitrage.
latency.noteDesc: Elite trader copies require sub-millisecond execution to match identical fill rates. By minimizing latency down to 0.05ms, your entries fill at the exact quote as the copied expert—preventing slippage completely.

step1.title: Direct Order Routing
step1.desc: Your trades avoid dealer desks entirely. Your copies map straight to prime banks, delivering standard market pricing without interference.

step2.title: Smart Order Routing (SOR)
step2.desc: CarbonTrade dynamically scans multiple global liquidity pools to secure the lowest possible entry price for every transaction.

step3.title: Clean Infrastructure Hosting
step3.desc: Our ECN bridge is physically housed inside Equinix NY4, enabling fiber-optic connectivity with the world's largest exchange networks.

spreads.desc: Compare average spreads from typical retail brokers side-by-side with CarbonTrade's institutional zero-pip spreads.
spreads.disclaimer: * ECN spreads fluctuate based on global liquidity depth. Direct market access structures execute instantly without dealer intervention.

gold.note: No markups during high market volatility

hero.desc: Why trade alone? Follow elite, verified performers automatically. Deploy allocation parameters, safe slippage controls, or inverse copy configurations in one tap.

how.title: How Copy Trading Works
how.desc: A seamless, zero-latency pipeline designed for modern capital.

step1.title: Select Elite Experts
step1.desc: Scan our verified trader index. Track metrics like win ratios, average drawdowns, and historical gain curves.

step2.title: Allocate Capital & Safety
step2.desc: Define investment bounds. Configure slippage locks and choose traditional or inverse replica positions.

step3.title: Automated Replica
step3.desc: Our ECN NY4 engine replicates trades in 0.05ms, ensuring you secure identical prices instantly.

directory.title: Elite Performers Directory
directory.desc: Verify real-time trading statistics, active portfolios, and ROI records of our master leaders.

tech.desc: Most platforms only let you copy the gainers. CarbonTrade introduces next-generation fading parameters, empowering you to monetize the exact opposite side of consistent losing records.
tech.inverseDesc: Identify consistent losers? Use our fading parameters to automatically execute opposite positions. If they Buy, you automatically Sell.
tech.slippageDesc: Reject copied pricing execution if the quote deviates higher than your custom safety threshold. You remain in control.

modal.title: Copy parameters preview
modal.desc: When you deploy copy allocations, you gain micro-granular control over slippage pips, invest amounts, and replication directions.

labels.replicationNote: * All replication flows are calculated millisecond by millisecond via our Equinix NY4 fiber ECN pipes.
